summary: Final Commercial Stabilization Pack testing completed successfully. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend attribution helper integration verified - localStorage persistence, URL param capture, and checkout flow all working correctly.

attribution_capture_service.notes: Properly extracts and hydrates attribution from payloads

guest_order_with_attribution.notes: Successfully stores affiliate_code, affiliate_email, affiliate_name, campaign_id, campaign_name, campaign_discount

premium_pdf_routes.notes: Premium PDF generation working with reportlab. Returns 404 for non-existent documents. PDF files verified as valid (%PDF-1.4 header). Tested with real invoice and quote IDs.

checkout_attribution_detection.notes: Returns has_attribution, supports affiliate query param

campaign_usage_logging.notes: Campaign usage logged after order creation via log_campaign_usage

frontend_attribution_helper.notes: localStorage persistence verified. URL param capture working. CheckoutPage uses getStoredAffiliateCode correctly.

app_js_attribution_bootstrap.notes: bootstrapAffiliateAttribution called on app load in useEffect

checkout_page_attribution.notes: Uses bootstrapAffiliateAttribution and getStoredAffiliateCode. Sends affiliate_code in order payload.

admin_panel_pdf_buttons.notes: PDF buttons visible and functional on both pages. 26 invoice elements found, quotes with PDF/Send/Convert actions.

critical_code_review_comments: attribution_capture_service.py: Clean implementation with proper null handling for campaign_discount
pdf_commercial_documents.py: Uses reportlab with modern layout, proper error handling for logo
document_pdf_routes.py: Correctly tries invoices_v2 first, then falls back to invoices collection
attribution.js: Proper SSR safety with typeof window checks
CheckoutPage.jsx: Correctly initializes affiliateCode state from bootstrapAffiliateAttribution

success_rate.frontend: 100% (attribution flow, checkout, admin PDF buttons verified)

seed_data_creation: Test orders created with full attribution (affiliate_code, campaign_id) for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final Commercial Stabilization Pack fully tested. Attribution capture service working across guest orders. Premium PDF routes return valid PDFs for invoices/quotes. Frontend attribution helper persists affiliate codes in localStorage and reads from URL params. App.js bootstraps attribution on load. CheckoutPage uses attribution helper correctly. Admin panel shows PDF buttons on invoices and quotes pages.

pdf_verification.invoice_pdf_test: Invoice PDF generated successfully for ID 69b23f50f123028024de936c (2874 bytes, valid PDF-1.4)
pdf_verification.quote_pdf_test: Quote PDF generated successfully for ID 69b23f51f123028024de936d (2858 bytes, valid PDF-1.4)
